name: modelcontextprotocol__servers__src__everything
description: Official MCP reference and test server that exercises every protocol feature: tools, resources, prompts, sampling, elicitation, roots, logging, and tasks

tools.name: get-sum
tools.description: Adds two numbers and returns their sum

tools.name: get-env
tools.description: Returns all environment variables of the server process as pretty-printed JSON

tools.name: get-tiny-image
tools.description: Returns a tiny PNG of the MCP logo as image content

tools.name: get-annotated-message
tools.description: Returns a message annotated with priority and audience based on the message type

tools.name: get-structured-content
tools.description: Returns both backward-compatible text content and schema-validated structuredContent

tools.name: get-resource-reference
tools.description: Returns an embedded resource content block for a given resource type and id

tools.name: get-resource-links
tools.description: Returns multiple resource_link items alternating between dynamic text and blob resources

tools.name: get-roots-list
tools.description: Returns the last list of roots sent by the client

tools.name: gzip-file-as-resource
tools.description: Fetches data from a URL or data URI, gzips it, and registers it as a session-scoped resource

tools.name: trigger-long-running-operation
tools.description: Simulates a multi-step operation that reports progress notifications

tools.name: toggle-simulated-logging
tools.description: Starts or stops simulated random-level log messages for the session

tools.name: toggle-subscriber-updates
tools.description: Starts or stops simulated resource update notifications for subscribed URIs

tools.name: trigger-elicitation-request
tools.description: Issues a form-mode elicitation request and returns the resulting action and content

tools.name: trigger-url-elicitation
tools.description: Issues a URL-mode elicitation request, including the URL-elicitation-required error path

tools.name: trigger-sampling-request
tools.description: Issues a sampling request to the client LLM and returns the response

tools.name: simulate-research-query
tools.description: Demonstrates MCP Tasks with a simulated multi-stage research operation

tools.name: trigger-sampling-request-async
tools.description: Demonstrates bidirectional tasks via a sampling request the client executes as a background task

tools.name: trigger-elicitation-request-async
tools.description: Demonstrates bidirectional tasks via an elicitation request the client executes as a background task

instructions: The official MCP reference and test server. It is not a productivity tool — it exists to exercise every MCP protocol feature: tools, resources (static, dynamic, and session-scoped), prompts, sampling, elicitation, roots, logging, progress notifications, and long-running tasks, including MCP Apps UI extensions where present. Runs locally via `npx` and needs no credentials or configuration.
